rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner Christine Bennett'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling: (1) Further Responses To Special Interrogatories; (2) Further Responses To Request For Production; (3) Production Of Documents; (4) Privilege Log; And (5) For Award Of Monetary Sanctions Against Trustee Michael Gridley
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner Christine Bennett's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Special Interrogatories and for Further Production of Documents, etc. is denied. The request for sanctions is denied. Any party who wishes to contest the tentative ruling must notify opposing counsel and the court (415-551-3702) before 5:00 p.m. on 9/12/12.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JOHNS FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Dated 7-19-12 And For Increase In Salary, Declaration In Support Thereof, & Notice Of Motion
rulings.Rulings: Michael John's Motion for Reconsideration of Order dated 7/19/12 is denied because it fails to meet the threshhold required for reconsideration. The request for an increase in salary is denied without prejudice to renewal following the next accounting. Any party who wishes to contest the tentative ruling must notify opposing parties and the court (415-551-3702) before 5:00 p.m. on 9/12/12.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE C.J. AND F. SCURRY REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner'S Motion For Reconsideration Of Petition For Fees Under The Common Fund Theory; Declarations Of Alan N. Herzfeld And Charlotte Mischeaux In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner Micheaux's Motion for Reconsideration of Petition for Fees Under the Common Fund is denied because it fails to meet the threshhold required for reconsideration. The Court denies the request to reconsider its order of 7/227/12 on the Court's own motion. The Court denies the request to apportion Micheaux's attorney fees incurred on her share among the sisters. Ms. Cobb's request for attorney fees and costs is denied. Any party who wishes to contest the tentative ruling must notify opposing counsel and the court (415-551-3702) before 5:00 p.m. on 9/12/12.
